footer.tagline2: Business cards, decks, and websites — delivered.

admin.fileFormats: PDF, PNG, JPG, ZIP — max 20 MB
admin.fileTypeError: File type "{{ext}}" is not allowed. Use PDF, PNG, JPG, or ZIP.

hero.subtitle: Business cards, presentations, and websites — designed by professionals and delivered straight to your inbox. No design experience needed.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title:
From brief to deliverable
in three steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple, fast, and transparent. No hidden steps, no chasing replies.

steps.title: Share your brief
steps.desc: Tell us what you need — your brand, your audience, and references you love. Takes 3 minutes. No design jargon required.

steps.title: We get to work
steps.desc: A professional designer picks up your brief and creates something polished within a few days — not weeks.

steps.title: Review and download
steps.desc: You get a private tracking link. Review your files, request one round of revisions, then download and go.

services.label: Services
services.title: Pick your project type
services.subtitle: Three focused services done exceptionally well. Tell us what you need — we'll handle the rest.

items.title: Business Card
items.desc: A card that makes a first impression worth remembering. Print-ready files delivered in multiple formats.

items.title: Presentation
items.desc: Pitch decks, investor briefs, and company overviews. Consistent slides that tell your story visually.

items.title: Website
items.desc: A clean, fast site built for results — portfolio, landing page, or small business presence.

reviews.label: Reviews
reviews.title: What clients say
reviews.subtitle: Real feedback from freelancers and business owners who've worked with us.

cta.label: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle1: Fill out a short form, and we'll take it from there.
cta.subtitle2: No design experience. No back-and-forth. Just results.

intake.label: New project
intake.title: Tell us about your project
intake.subtitle: The more detail you share, the better we can match your vision. Takes about 3 minutes.
intake.name: Your name
intake.visionHint: What's this for? What do you want people to feel when they see it?
intake.visionPlaceholder: I run a yoga studio and want a card that feels calm, premium, and modern…
intake.colorsHint: Any colors you love (or hate)? Words that describe your vibe?
intake.colorsPlaceholder: Warm earth tones, no blues, something like Aesop's branding
intake.referencesHint: Paste links to designs you admire, or name brands with a look you like
intake.additionalPlaceholder: Special requirements, deadline, number of variants needed…
intake.consent: By submitting you agree we'll contact you about your project.

success.title: Brief received!
success.subtitle: We're reviewing your project brief and will get started shortly. Use the link below to track your project status and download files when they're ready.
success.emailNote: We also sent this link to your email. Bookmark it to check back anytime.

tracking.notReadyDesc: Your download will appear here once the work is complete.

notFound.title: Project not found
notFound.subtitle: We couldn't find a project with this tracking link. Check your email for the correct link.

descriptions.BRIEF_SUBMITTED: We've received your brief and it's in the queue.
descriptions.IN_PROGRESS: Your project is actively being worked on.
descriptions.REVIEW: Your files are ready. Download below and let us know if you need a revision.
descriptions.DELIVERED: Project complete. Thank you for working with us!

errors.tooManyRequests: You've submitted too many requests recently. Please wait an hour and try again.
